## The problem

<!-- What is missing, manual, or annoying today? -->

## Proposed solution

## How it fits the trust-engineering model

Jarvis is built around rules the agent cannot talk itself out of. Answer
honestly:

- Does this feature move money in any way? (hard no)
- Does it contact anyone other than the owner: send, post, apply, message?
  (hard no; drafts stamped "REVIEW - NOT SENT" are the accepted pattern)
- Does it auto-send anything without a human review step? (hard no)

If any answer is yes, the feature will not be accepted in that form. A
draft-plus-review variant might be.

## Footprint

The reference machine is a laptop with 7.4 GB of RAM. Always-on background
processes have historically been rejected; scheduled or on-demand runs are
preferred. What does this feature cost when idle?
